title: We're excited to announce our strategic partnership with MelodyArc ...
full_text:
Movate's Post
Movate
5d ·
We're excited to announce our strategic partnership with MelodyArc to help enterprises transform customer experience operations through AI-powered workflow orchestration. Learn more - https://www.prnewswire.com/.../movate-and-melodyarc...
This partnership brings together Movate’s expertise in global CX delivery and Applied AI with MelodyArc’s intelligent orchestration platform, enabling enterprises to streamline and orchestrate complex customer experience workflows while maintaining the governance, visibility, and human oversight required to scale AI responsibly.
Together, we’re helping enterprises accelerate AI adoption across CX operations, improve productivity, reduce cost-to-serve, and deliver more personalized customer experiences at scale.
As organizations continue to reimagine customer experience in the AI era, this collaboration represents an important step toward building smarter, more connected, and outcome-driven operations that create lasting business value.
#Movate #MelodyArc #AppliedAI #CustomerExperience #CXTransformation #AgenticAI #EnterpriseAI #WorkflowAutomation #DigitalTransformation
Like
Comment
